overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a AAA video game depicting an ancient Roman or Greek setting at night. The player character walks through a torch-lit villa courtyard with a central fountain, exits through a narrow stone passage, and emerges onto a cobblestone street lined with classical architecture and Mediterranean vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Roman villa courtyard with central fountain and dining area

events.description: character begins circling around the central fountain to approach the main villa entrance
robed NPC comes into view standing near the villa entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the torch-lit courtyard, circling the central fountain while observing the Roman architecture and surroundings

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the villa entrance, appearing to guard or observe the courtyard

entered.detail: large stone building with wooden entrance door and red banners, lit by wall-mounted torches
circular stone fountain with classical statue in the center, water reflecting torchlight
stone seating arranged around the courtyard perimeter
decorative white lattice fencing along the right side of the courtyard
red fabric banners strung between trees and posts near the dining area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a Roman villa courtyard at night, illuminated by torchlight. The camera follows the character as they walk past stone benches and a lattice fence, approaching a central fountain with a classical statue. The character circles the fountain while a robed NPC stands near the main building entrance, which features large wooden doors flanked by wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service passage between villa buildings with overgrown vegetation

events.description: character ascends stairs and exits the courtyard through a stone doorway into a narrow passage
moving deeper into the narrow alley where walls block most ambient light, creating darker shadows

agents.ego_description: passing through the stone doorway and walking down the narrow passage between high walls

entered.detail: rectangular stone doorway marking the exit from the main courtyard
tall stone walls on both sides creating a confined corridor
square metal brazier with burning flames providing light in the passage
bushes and plants growing along the base of the passage walls

segments.scene_description: The character exits the open courtyard through a stone doorway, transitioning into a narrow, enclosed passage between high stone walls. The space is dimly lit by fire pits and wall torches, with overgrown vegetation visible along the path. The camera moves steadily forward through the confined corridor toward a distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Roman residential street with villas and Mediterranean gardens

events.description: emerges from the narrow alley onto an open cobblestone street lined with trees and buildings
street opens up revealing more residential buildings with lit windows and decorative street elements

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone street, passing flower planters and wall-mounted torches while heading toward the distant buildings

notable_agents.action: civilian in simple clothing walking along the wall in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wide stone-paved street with irregular cobblestones and dirt patches
two-story stone villas with red trim, columns, and lit windows
tall Mediterranean pine trees lining the left side of the street
rectangular stone planters with red flowers and green shrubs
iron torch sconces attached to the right wall providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow passage onto an open cobblestone street in a residential district. The street is lined with stone villas featuring classical columns and red trim, illuminated by wall-mounted torches. Mediterranean trees and flower planters decorate the path as the character passes a civilian walking in the opposite direction, heading toward a large villa at the end of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, torch-lit confines of a private villa courtyard into the open atmosphere of a residential city street. It begins by following a character past stone benches and a lattice fence toward a central fountain and a robed figure standing by large wooden doors. As the character moves forward, the open courtyard gives way to a narrow, enclosed stone passage where the light dims and overgrown vegetation clings to the high walls. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the corridor onto a wide cobblestone street lined with classical villas featuring red trim and white columns. Finally, the path opens further among Mediterranean trees and flower planters, passing a civilian while heading toward a large estate at the end of the road.
